docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATRE, MARCIA L IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE ON NOV 14/25. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION. RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MATRE, MARCIA L
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MATRE, MARCIA L AS TO DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS 0.00 SERVED SEP-12-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JON VENNARUCCI FILED BY DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-29-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARCIA L. MATRE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIAMOND HEIGHTS VILLAGE ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IS JON VENNARUCCI. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
